overlap_core_with_parallel_pressure_pml.description: Also run residual and len16 pressure-PML kernels in separate streams after v_pml.
requires: v_pml done event fanout to residual and len16 pressure streams
proof residual and len16 tile lists write disjoint p0/mem_dzz/mem_dz_next regions

overlap_core_with_serial_pml_path.description: Run p_core concurrently with the whole v_pml -> pressure-PML path.
requires: p_core stream independent from PML stream
default stream waits for both streams before injection/extract
next iteration streams wait for post-injection event

overlap_core_with_v_only.description: Run p_core concurrently with v_pml only; pressure kernels remain after both.

prototype_boundaries: do not change CUDA math kernels
do not overlap next time step before injection/extract completes
first prototype uses two streams only; pressure residual/len16 parallel fanout requires a later gate
gate.reason: The conservative two-stream schedule only needs about 15.13% realized overlap to reach 1.0500x sampled-main speedup, while preserving kernel math and ownership.

notes: p_core reads p1/cw2 and writes p0 only in the core region.
v_pml reads p1 and writes vx/vy plus CPML velocity state.
pressure PML reads vx/vy and writes p0 only in PML regions.
source injection/extraction must wait for both core and PML streams before pointer swap reuse.
